name: Spinach Dip II
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg dried leek soupmix (dried soup mix sufficient for making 1 liter of soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook or thaw the spinach and then squeeze out excess moisture.
2. Combine the spinach with the mayonnaise, sour cream, green onion, and soupmix.
3. Refrigerate for 30 minutes before serving.
Author's Notes:
Anything that tastes this good couldn't be good for you.
Knorr brand soupmix is available worldwide, but other brands will work.
One package is enough to make approximately one liter of soup. Serve with crackers or a sliced baguette.
